name: Oatmeal Cookies 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the shortening for 30 seconds.
2. Add the brown sugar and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Mix in the oats.
4. Dissolve the baking soda in water and set aside.
5. Mix in the vanilla extract and salt.
6. Add the flour, mixing alternately with the water.
7. Ensure that it is well mixed.
8. Roll out dough on a floured board to 1/4 inch thickness.
9. Cut with cookie cutters.
10. Bake at 375°F on a cookie sheet for 12 to 15 minutes.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
